title: Terminal vec-op direct output
hypothesis: After proving direct terminal-output for final GEMM tails, the next bounded mapper step should test whether a terminal vec-op family can also write directly to Y_DRAM, starting from measurement-only references before any paired judgment.

direct_comparison.primary_question: Can a bounded terminal vec-op family establish clean nm1 reference points first, then show a direct-output win on those same points without reopening broader ranking?
include: measurement-only non-fused nm1 reference points on a bounded standalone terminal Relu vec-op suite
paired direct-output vs non-fused nm1 comparison on the same standalone terminal Relu suite after local legality and quality checks
exclude: broad architecture sweeps before terminal vec-op legality is established
broad terminal-op-family claims beyond the chosen first-pass standalone terminal Relu family
follow_on_broad_sweep: run broader ranking or broader terminal-op-family evaluation only if the bounded vec-op comparison is positive or mixed enough to justify reintegration

expected_benefit: extends the accepted direct-output mechanism beyond final GEMM writeback
keeps the next proof focused on mapper legality and tail-writeback behavior rather than ranking noise
reuses the measurement-first evaluation model so reference points can be recorded without forcing premature win/loss language
risks: the chosen standalone terminal Relu family may still be too narrow to justify a separate proposal
the mapper may need more explicit terminal vec-op handling than the current bounded direct-output path
the measurement-first suite might still miss a later need for broader activation coverage

expected_result.reason: the first item should only record non-fused nm1 reference metrics for the bounded standalone terminal Relu vec-op suite
if terminal vec-op direct-output lowering is valid, it should improve at least part of the bounded standalone terminal Relu suite against the refreshed non-fused references
